title: Glassnode Expands to Track Traditional Finance Digital Asset Markets
summary: Glassnode now tracks price and volume data for US Spot ETFs and Digital Asset Treasury Companies, bridging the gap between crypto and traditional finance. This move provides a more comprehensive view of digital asset markets beyond crypto-native venues.
body:
Glassnode, a leading blockchain analytics firm, has expanded its coverage to include traditional finance (TradFi) markets. The company now tracks price and volume data for US Spot ETFs and Digital Asset Treasury Companies, offering a more holistic view of digital asset markets.

This expansion allows investors to monitor the performance of digital assets across both crypto-native and traditional financial venues. The inclusion of US Spot ETFs and Digital Asset Treasury Companies provides valuable insights into how these assets are performing in the broader financial ecosystem.

For everyday investors, this means better tools to track the performance of digital assets in traditional markets. It bridges the gap between crypto and TradFi, making it easier to understand the overall market dynamics. This can help investors make more informed decisions about their portfolios.

Investors should watch for updates on how these new data points integrate with existing analytics tools. This expansion could lead to more sophisticated market analysis and better-informed investment strategies. Keep an eye on Glassnode's platform for new features and insights.
